blocks.text: I'm focusing on ensuring that the JSON strings I create are valid. It's essential to be precise and avoid errors because even a small mistake can lead to issues. I want to craft these strings compactly, making sure they're not only correct but also efficient. I'll look into common pitfalls and double-check my syntax as I go along, to avoid any potential problems. It feels like getting everything right is really important, especially when it comes to encoding data accurately!
